name: Newton-Raphson pricing
description: Two-step pricing mechanism for local electricity markets (LEM) using Uniform Pricing (UP) with price caps (ToU/FiT) in the first step, and a choice of either Newton-Raphson post-auction price adjustments (CUPA-PPA) or mediated P2P trading (CUPA-P2P) in the second step to clear remaining unmatched quantities.
objective: Maximize local energy trading efficiency, reduce grid dependency, minimize extreme bidding behavior through a profit-redistribution mechanism, and provide stable, fair trading prices within the bounds of Feed-in Tariffs (FiT) and Time-of-Use (ToU) rates.

symbols.name: Timestamp
symbols.definition: Date and time of the market trading interval

symbols.name: member_id
symbols.definition: Unique identifier for each participant in the energy community

symbols.name: member_type
symbols.definition: Type of the market participant (e.g., prosumer, residential, commercial)

symbols.name: load
symbols.definition: Electricity consumption (demand) of member m at interval t

symbols.name: generation
symbols.definition: Electricity generation (supply) of member m at interval t

symbols.name: ToU
symbols.definition: Time-of-Use tariff representing the buying price of electricity from the grid

symbols.name: FiT
symbols.definition: Feed-in Tariff representing the selling price of electricity back to the grid

symbols.name: D_mt
symbols.definition: Net demand (quantity bid) of buyer b at trading interval t

symbols.name: S_mt
symbols.definition: Net supply (quantity offer) of seller s at trading interval t

symbols.name: P_bid_mt
symbols.definition: Bidding price representing the maximum price buyer b is willing to pay at interval t

symbols.name: P_ask_mt
symbols.definition: Asking price representing the minimum price seller s is willing to accept at interval t

symbols.name: P_UP_t
symbols.definition: Market-clearing price determined using the Uniform Price auction in step 1

symbols.name: QT_UP_b_mt
symbols.definition: Quantity traded by buyer b under the UP mechanism in step 1 at interval t

symbols.name: QT_UP_s_mt
symbols.definition: Quantity traded by seller s under the UP mechanism in step 1 at interval t

symbols.name: Unmatched_D_mt
symbols.definition: Unmatched demand quantity of buyer b after the UP mechanism

symbols.name: Unmatched_S_mt
symbols.definition: Unmatched supply quantity of seller s after the UP mechanism

symbols.name: beta
symbols.definition: Iterative adjustment coefficient for CUPA-PPA mechanism solved using Newton-Raphson

symbols.name: P_beta_t
symbols.definition: Equilibrium clearing price achieved through CUPA-PPA post-auction price adjustments

symbols.name: P_s_b_mt
symbols.definition: Mediation price for transaction pair between seller s and buyer b under CUPA-P2P

symbols.name: QT_step2_b_mt
symbols.definition: Additional matched demand cleared in Step 2 (either via PPA or P2P)

symbols.name: QT_step2_s_mt
symbols.definition: Additional matched supply cleared in Step 2 (either via PPA or P2P)

symbols.name: P_Tx_mt
symbols.definition: Transaction price used for step 2 cleared quantity (equal to P_beta_t for PPA, P_s_b_mt for P2P)

symbols.name: PayBack_b_mt
symbols.definition: Profit redistribution payback from buyers who trade at lower prices in step 2

symbols.name: PayBack_s_mt
symbols.definition: Profit redistribution payback from sellers who trade at higher prices in step 2

symbols.name: Redistribution_t
symbols.definition: Total payback redistributed equally to all market participants at interval t

symbols.name: QT_B_mt
symbols.definition: Total traded demand for member m at interval t

symbols.name: QT_S_mt
symbols.definition: Total traded supply (surplus) for member m at interval t

symbols.name: IPay_mt
symbols.definition: Initial payment / utility baseline for member m without LEM trading at interval t

symbols.name: FPay_mt
symbols.definition: Final payment / utility value for member m with LEM trading at interval t

symbols.name: CST_m
symbols.definition: Cost savings from trading for member m over the entire evaluation period

symbols.name: GDI
symbols.definition: Grid Dependence Index measuring reliance on the centralized grid

symbols.name: STR
symbols.definition: Surplus Trading Ratio measuring efficiency of trading local surplus inside the LEM

symbols.name: DCR
symbols.definition: Deficit Coverage Ratio measuring local demand coverage inside the LEM

symbols.name: ETR
symbols.definition: Energy Trading Ratio representing local trade relative to community total consumption

symbols.name: TEI
symbols.definition: Trading Efficiency Index relating final financial flows to local solar generation

symbols.name: CST
symbols.definition: Aggregate Cost Savings from Trading across all market participants

symbols.name: Gini
symbols.definition: Gini Index for Savings evaluating financial benefit inequality among LEM members

symbols.name: QMaxT_t
symbols.definition: Maximum tradable quantity of unmatched balances at interval t

parameters.name: ToU
parameters.definition: Time-of-Use tariff mapping hourly retail electricity price from grid

parameters.name: FiT
parameters.definition: Feed-in Tariff mapping hourly purchase rate back to grid

derived_variables.name: D_mt
derived_variables.definition: Calculated demand net of local PV generation for each member

derived_variables.name: S_mt
derived_variables.definition: Calculated supply surplus of local generation over local load for each member

derived_variables.name: P_bid_mt
derived_variables.definition: Simulated buying price bid representing maximum willingness to pay

derived_variables.name: P_ask_mt
derived_variables.definition: Simulated selling price offer representing minimum willingness to accept

derived_variables.name: P_UP_t
derived_variables.definition: Uniform market-clearing price calculated during the first-stage auction

derived_variables.name: QT_UP_b_mt
derived_variables.definition: Matched volume of buyer b cleared at UP price in step 1

derived_variables.name: QT_UP_s_mt
derived_variables.definition: Matched volume of seller s cleared at UP price in step 1

derived_variables.name: Unmatched_D_mt
derived_variables.definition: Volume of unmatched bids of buyers for further clearance in step 2

derived_variables.name: Unmatched_S_mt
derived_variables.definition: Volume of unmatched offers of sellers for further clearance in step 2

derived_variables.name: beta
derived_variables.definition: Iterative parameter determining scale of pricing shifts to match remaining volume in PPA step 2

derived_variables.name: P_beta_t
derived_variables.definition: Adjusted market-clearing equilibrium price computed using Newton-Raphson in CUPA-PPA

derived_variables.name: P_s_b_mt
derived_variables.definition: Calculated average price for individual trading matches in CUPA-P2P step 2

derived_variables.name: QT_step2_b_mt
derived_variables.definition: Assigned cleared demand under step 2 pricing logic (CUPA-PPA or CUPA-P2P)

derived_variables.name: QT_step2_s_mt
derived_variables.definition: Assigned cleared supply under step 2 pricing logic (CUPA-PPA or CUPA-P2P)

derived_variables.name: P_Tx_mt
derived_variables.definition: Final matched transaction price used for financial settlements in step 2

derived_variables.name: PayBack_b_mt
derived_variables.definition: Value computed to capture buyer's profit margins under post-auction adjustments

derived_variables.name: PayBack_s_mt
derived_variables.definition: Value computed to capture seller's profit margins under post-auction adjustments

derived_variables.name: Redistribution_t
derived_variables.definition: Equal monetary rebate distributed per participant at interval t

derived_variables.name: QT_B_mt
derived_variables.definition: Summed traded demand from primary and secondary clearing mechanisms

derived_variables.name: QT_S_mt
derived_variables.definition: Summed traded supply from primary and secondary clearing mechanisms

derived_variables.name: IPay_mt
derived_variables.definition: Baseline costs or revenues of participants without any LEM integration

derived_variables.name: FPay_mt
derived_variables.definition: Final net costs or revenues for community members after accounting for market transactions

derived_variables.name: QMaxT_t
derived_variables.definition: Maximum tradable quantity of unmatched balances at interval t

equations.expression: Sort buyers descending by P_bid_mt and sellers ascending by P_ask_mt. P_UP_t is the price where cumulative demand intersects cumulative supply, i.e., Sum(D_mt * I(P_bid_mt >= P_UP_t)) >= Sum(S_mt * I(P_ask_mt <= P_UP_t)) and the prior element constraint holds.
beta_i = beta_{i-1} - f(beta_{i-1})/f'(beta_{i-1}) where f(beta) = min(Sum(Unmatched_D_mt), Sum(Unmatched_S_mt)) - min(D_beta, S_beta)
P_s_b_mt = 0.5 * (P_ask_mt + P_bid_mt) for adjacent pairs in sorted unmatched lists
PayBack_b_mt = QT_step2_b_mt * (P_UP_t - P_Tx_mt) if P_Tx_mt < P_UP_t else 0
PayBack_s_mt = QT_step2_s_mt * (P_Tx_mt - P_UP_t) if P_Tx_mt > P_UP_t else 0
IPay_mt = (D_mt * ToU) if load >= generation else (S_mt * FiT)

FPay_mt = (QT_B_mt * P_UP_t + (D_mt - QT_B_mt) * ToU - Redistribution_t) if load >= generation else (QT_S_mt * P_UP_t + (S_mt - QT_S_mt) * FiT + Redistribution_t) (with adjustments based on P_Tx_mt for secondary trading matches)
CST_m = ((IPay_mt - FPay_mt)/IPay_mt)*100 for buyers, and ((FPay_mt - IPay_mt)/IPay_mt)*100 for sellers (integrated over evaluation horizon)
Gini = Sum_{m=1}^N Sum_{n=1}^N |CST_m - CST_n| / (2 * N^2 * mean(CST_m))

steps.name: Local Demand and Supply Calculation
pseudocode: D_mt = max(0, load - generation)
S_mt = max(0, generation - load)

steps.name: Bidding and Offer Price Generation
pseudocode: P_bid_mt = randomly generated values between FiT and ToU rates for each buyer
P_ask_mt = randomly generated values between FiT and ToU rates for each seller

steps.name: First-Stage Uniform Price Auction Clearing
pseudocode: For each t:
Sort buyers' bids descending of P_bid
Sort sellers' offers ascending of P_ask
Find price point P_UP_t where cumulative demand == cumulative supply
Set matched volumes QT_UP_b_mt and QT_UP_s_mt based on clearing price P_UP_t

steps.name: Identify Unmatched Balances
pseudocode: Unmatched_D_mt = D_mt - QT_UP_b_mt
Unmatched_S_mt = S_mt - QT_UP_s_mt

steps.name: Newton-Raphson Post-Auction Pricing (CUPA-PPA)
pseudocode: Initialize beta = 0.001
Loop to solve f(beta) = 0 via Newton-Raphson:
Adjust bid prices: P_bid_adj = (1 + beta) * P_bid
Adjust ask prices: P_ask_adj = (1 - beta) * P_ask
Update beta_next = beta - f(beta)/f'(beta)
If convergence or P_beta_t bounds [FiT, ToU] are breached, stop.
Set P_beta_t based on final converged beta
Calculate step 2 trade quantities QT_step2_b_mt and QT_step2_s_mt at P_beta_t

steps.name: Mediated P2P Alternative Clearing (CUPA-P2P)
pseudocode: Alternative option to step_5:
Sort remaining unmatched bids and offers
Match sequential pairs directly if prices bounds [FiT, ToU] allow
Mediation price P_s_b_mt = average(P_ask, P_bid)
Set step 2 quantities QT_step2_b_mt and QT_step2_s_mt based on matched pairs

steps.name: Profit Payback and Redistribution
pseudocode: Calculate payback for buyers trading below UP price: PayBack_b_mt
Calculate payback for sellers trading above UP price: PayBack_s_mt
Sum paybacks and divide equally across all N participants to compute Redistribution_t

steps.name: Monetary Flows and Savings Evaluation
pseudocode: Compute baseline payment IPay_mt for all participants
Compute net payment FPay_mt with transaction costs and redistribution cashflows
Evaluate individual cost savings percentage CST_m

steps.name: Community Market Performance Metrics
pseudocode: Calculate Grid Dependence Index GDI
Calculate Surplus Trading Ratio STR
Calculate Deficit Coverage Ratio DCR
Calculate Energy Trading Ratio ETR
Calculate Trading Efficiency Index TEI
Calculate overall Cost Savings from Trading CST
Construct Lorenz curve and calculate Gini Index of savings
Step 1 (Eq_1 & Eq_2): Compute net demand D_mt = max(0, load - generation) and net supply S_mt = max(0, generation - load) for each participant m and interval t.
Step 2: Generate random bid prices P_bid_mt and ask prices P_ask_mt between FiT_t and ToU_t for active buyers and sellers.

Step 3 (Eq_3): For each interval t, filter out bids outside [FiT_t, ToU_t]. Sort valid buyers descending by P_bid_mt and valid sellers ascending by P_ask_mt. Match pairs sequentially where P_bid >= P_ask. Compute clearing price P_UP_t as the average of the marginal bids of the last matched pair. Assign step-1 cleared volumes QT_UP_b_mt and QT_UP_s_mt.
Step 4 (Eq_4 & Eq_5): Compute Unmatched_D_mt = D_mt - QT_UP_b_mt and Unmatched_S_mt = S_mt - QT_UP_s_mt.
Step 5 (Eq_QMaxT): Compute the maximum tradable quantity of unmatched balances QMaxT_t = min(Sum_m(Unmatched_D_mt), Sum_m(Unmatched_S_mt)).

Step 6 (Eq_6 & Eq_7): For PPA mode, solve for beta using Newton-Raphson. Set initial beta = beta_init. In each iteration, adjust bids by (1 + beta) and asks by (1 - beta). Compute the adjusted average clearing price P_beta_t. Count the matching supply S_beta and demand D_beta at this adjusted price. Update beta using beta_next = beta - f(beta)/f'(beta) where f'(beta) is approximated numerically using a finite step 1e-5. Stop if P_beta_t exceeds [FiT_t, ToU_t], if changes are below tolerance, or if max_iter is reached. Compute QT_step2_b_mt and QT_step2_s_mt as the matched remaining quantities under the converged P_beta_t.

Step 7 (Eq_8): For P2P mode, sort the unmatched buyers descending and unmatched sellers ascending. Match sequential pairs directly up to QMaxT_t. For each matched pair, compute the average mediation price P_s_b_mt = 0.5 * (P_ask + P_bid). Set step 2 cleared quantities QT_step2_b_mt and QT_step2_s_mt.

Step 8 (Eq_9 & Eq_10): Calculate payback for buyers who trade below the step-1 clearing price: PayBack_b_mt = QT_step2_b_mt * (P_UP_t - P_Tx_mt) if P_Tx_mt < P_UP_t else 0. Calculate payback for sellers who trade above step-1 clearing price: PayBack_s_mt = QT_step2_s_mt * (P_Tx_mt - P_UP_t) if P_Tx_mt > P_UP_t else 0.
Step 9 (Eq_11): Compute total payback and distribute equally among all active participants at interval t: Redistribution_t = (Sum_m(PayBack_b_mt) + Sum_m(PayBack_s_mt)) / N.
Step 10: Sum the step-1 and step-2 trades to find QT_B_mt = QT_UP_b_mt + QT_step2_b_mt and QT_S_mt = QT_UP_s_mt + QT_step2_s_mt.
Step 11 (Eq_12): Compute baseline cost/revenue IPay_mt = D_mt * ToU_t for buyers and S_mt * FiT_t for sellers.

Step 12 (Eq_13): Compute the final settlement payment/revenue with trading and redistribution: For buyers, FPay_mt = QT_UP_b_mt * P_UP_t + QT_step2_b_mt * P_Tx_mt + PayBack_b_mt + (D_mt - QT_B_mt) * ToU_t - Redistribution_t. For sellers, FPay_mt = QT_UP_s_mt * P_UP_t + QT_step2_s_mt * P_Tx_mt - PayBack_s_mt + (S_mt - QT_S_mt) * FiT_t + Redistribution_t.
Step 13 (Eq_14): Evaluate individual cost savings CST_m = ((IPay_mt - FPay_mt)/IPay_mt)*100 for buyers and ((FPay_mt - IPay_mt)/IPay_mt)*100 for sellers.
Step 14 (Eq_15 - Eq_21): Calculate global metrics: GDI, STR, DCR, ETR, TEI, CST, and the Gini index of savings.
validation_checks: Verify 'load' and 'generation' columns are present in the input dataset.
Ensure all timestamps are correctly sorted and unique.
Check that ToU and FiT tariff rates are non-negative and ToU >= FiT.
Confirm that cumulative matching quantities in step 1 and step 2 do not exceed physical limits.
